news.summary: In a recent collaboration with Babylon, Kraken has introduced a new Bitcoin staking service. This partnership enables users to participate in staking activities and receive BABY tokens as rewards in return for their engagement. This move is expected to provide an opportunity for users to earn rewards while actively participating in the staking process using Bitcoin.
news.headline: Kraken introduces Bitcoin staking via Babylon integration, offering users opportunity to earn BABY tokens.

news.summary: A resident of St. Augustine, Florida, Don Wenner has been honored as the recipient of the prestigious EY Entrepreneur Of The Year® award for 2025 in Florida. Wenner is recognized for his leadership at DLP Capital, a company dedicated to changing lives through the provision of affordable housing solutions. This accolade signifies Wenner's outstanding contribution to the community and his commitment to making a positive impact on housing availability.
news.headline: Don Wenner of DLP Capital wins EY Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 Florida Award for impact on affordable housing.

news.summary: A recent independent study conducted by GlobeScan in Ottawa, Canada, indicates significant progress for Fairtrade in the country. According to the 2025 GlobeScan Consumer Insights report, Canadian consumer awareness, trust, and purchasing loyalty towards Fairtrade have been steadily increasing. The study reveals that recognition of the Fairtrade Mark has surged by 14 percentage points since 2019, reaching 50% in 2025. This growth solidifies Fairtrade as one of the leading ethical labels in Canada, showing the fastest expansion in consumer acknowledgment within the market. Trust in the Fairtrade Mark also remains robust, with 8 out of 10 consumers... For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: New GlobeScan report shows Fairtrade's growth in Canada with awareness at 50%, up by 14% since 2019, making it a top ethical label.

news.summary: The Global Lithium-ion Battery Market is projected to see significant growth, from $117.8 billion in 2024 to an estimated $221.7 billion by the end of 2029, with a CAGR of 13.5%. The market study extensively covers key components such as cathodes and electrolytes, various battery types, and applications like automotive, electronics, and energy storage. The surge in EV sales globally, growing demand for energy storage using repurposed LIBs, falling LIB prices encouraging EV deployment, government support for transportation electrification, and grid-level use of LIBs with renewable energy sources are highlighted as market drivers. This growth is supported by worldwide subsidies, tax incentives, and emission regulations. This information is key to industry planning and development.
news.headline: Global Lithium-ion Battery Market expected to grow from $117.8B in 2024 to $221.7B by 2029, with CAGR of 13.5%. EVs driving market growth.

news.summary: Heartland Paving Partners (Heartland) announced on June 19, 2025, that they have completed the acquisition of Macadam Company, a reputable pavement solutions provider that has been operating for almost four decades in the Mid-Atlantic region. Macadam, based in Pennsylvania, is known for its expertise and has built a solid reputation over the years.
news.headline: Heartland Paving Partners acquires Macadam Company with 40 years of experience in Mid-Atlantic region. Strengthening regional reach.

news.summary: In Thornton, Colorado, Anythink Libraries, a renowned public library system, is introducing the Community Concert Series, a new initiative celebrating live music and community bonding in Adams County. Expanding on the previous Backyard Concert Series, this revamped program will feature live music performances in parks and public areas throughout Adams County through partnerships with local organizations. The series will culminate in a special library-hosted concert at Anythink's latest location. This development aims to bring music to various locations in the area, fostering connections and entertainment for residents.
news.headline: Anythink Libraries in Colorado introduces new Community Concert Series in Summer 2025, expanding from backyards to parks.

news.summary: Recently, Profound secured a significant investment in Series A funding to support the launch of Profound Lite, solidifying its position as the top marketing platform for brands adapting to an AI-focused, zero-click online landscape. This New York-based company is trusted by marketers to manage their online presence in AI-driven environments.
news.headline: Profound secures $20M in Series A for AI marketing platform; helps brands adapt to zero-click internet.

news.summary: On June 19, 2025, in Qingdao, China, the 6th Qingdao Multinationals Summit commenced at the Qingdao International Conference Center. This summit provides a premier platform for policy discussions, industrial partnerships, and project connections. The event aims to facilitate dialogue among international entities and foster collaboration in various sectors.
news.headline: 6th Qingdao Multinationals Summit opens in China, promoting high-level opening-up and development. High-level platform for policy dialogue, industrial collaboration, and project matchmaking.

news.summary: In Quebec City on June 19, 2025, Zilia, a Canadian health tech company, announced that its leading product, the Zilia Ocular™, has been granted approval by Health Canada. This groundbreaking device is the world's first authorized tool to measure oxygen saturation in the eye. This approval marks a significant milestone for Zilia as they continue to innovate in the health technology sector.
news.headline: Zilia Ocular by Canadian company approved by Health Canada to measure eye oxygen saturation, first of its kind globally.

news.summary: The Federal Reserve announced on Wednesday that they will maintain interest rates at the current range of 4.25%-4.50% for the fourth consecutive meeting. This decision has sparked growing criticism, with calls for Chairman Jerome Powell to step down immediately gaining momentum. The backlash, originating from political and industry figures, has particularly intensified within sectors affected by high borrowing costs, notably the housing industry. Bill Pulte, the U.S. Director of Federal Housing Finance Agency associated with oversight of Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac, delivered a scathing critique of Powell on social media platform X. Pulte accused Powell of negatively impacting the housing market through delayed rate cuts and demanded his immediate resignation. The sentiments expressed by Pulte reflect a broader sentiment within the housing industry and beyond. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Backlash grows against Powell as housing sector demands his resignation for delaying rate cuts, with Pulte calling for immediate action.

news.summary: Atlanta - On June 19, 2025, Liquid Web, a renowned provider of dedicated servers, VPS, GPU, and WordPress hosting services tailored for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs), revealed a forthcoming webinar titled: "Top Trends & Key Insights from WordCamp Europe 2025." The webinar, led by industry experts, is set to provide an exclusive opportunity for businesses to gain insights into the latest developments and takeaways from the event.

news.summary: JAGGAER, a prominent player in Source-to-Pay and supplier collaboration, based in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, has recently secured ISO/IEC 42001:2023 certification for its Artificial Intelligence Management System (AIMS). This milestone makes JAGGAER the inaugural company in the Source-to-Pay (S2P) sector to meet this demanding global standard. The certification underscores JAGGAER's dedication to the ethical and responsible advancement and safe utilization of AI technologies.
news.headline: JAGGAER is first S2P company to achieve ISO/IEC 42001 certification for AI Management System, highlighting ethical development.

news.summary: Tested with various top corporations, the model will soon be incorporated into Kellogg School of Management's courses. It utilizes a scientific method to forecast outcomes and assist in the efficient execution and ranking of enterprise AI investments. This development was announced in Edison, N.J. on June 19, 2025.
news.headline: C5i introduces AI Impact Model for enterprise AI investments, piloted with Fortune 500 firms and to be integrated into Kellogg programs.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City on June 19, 2025, FatPipe, Inc. (NASDAQ: FATN) announced their innovative enterprise-class, application-aware, secure software-defined wide area network ("SD-WAN") solutions. FatPipe is a pioneer in this technology, offering the highest levels of reliability and security to their customers. This advancement marks a significant development in the networking industry.
news.headline: FatPipe, Inc. (NASDAQ: FATN) will present at Northland Capital Markets Growth Conference 2025 in Salt Lake City.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on June 19, 2025, Tuya Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its yearly general meeting, conducted at 2:00 p.m. Hong Kong time. Tuya, a prominent cloud platform service provider worldwide, operates under the tickers NYSE: TUYA and HKEX: 2391.
news.headline: Tuya Inc. reveals outcomes of its Annual General Meeting, held at 2:00 p.m. in Hong Kong, on June 19, 2025.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 19, 2025, Titan Mining Corporation (TSX: TI; OTCQB: TIMCF) shared that the Export-Import Bank of the United States (“EXIM”) has sanctioned a US$15.8 million financing for its subsidiary, Empire State Mines LLC (“ESM”). This funding aims to aid in enhancing zinc production and furthering ESM’s critical minerals projects in St. Lawrence County, New York.
news.headline: Export-Import Bank of the United States approves US$15.8M financing for Titan Mining Corp's subsidiary to enhance zinc production in New York.

news.summary: MT Højgaard Danmark, a business unit of MT Højgaard Holding, has secured the contract to construct a new workshop for driverless trains and administration facilities in Vinge, winning DSB’s tender. The contract, with an initial estimated total value of DKK 1,950 million, includes provisions for additional optional work worth up to DKK 900 million. Following the standstill period which ended on June 30, 2025, the agreement is now in effect.
news.headline: MT Højgaard Danmark wins DSB tender for DKK 1.95 billion to build a workshop for driverless trains in Vinge.

news.summary: In New York, Surgimate, a prominent provider of surgical coordination and scheduling software in the United States, has named Jessica Cook as its Chief Revenue Officer. This newly established role will be responsible for leading all sales and marketing initiatives for Surgimate's various business segments, which encompass surgical scheduling, medical device coordination, and patient access. Working alongside CEO Kraig Brown, Cook will play a key role in developing and executing growth-focused strategies for the company.
news.headline: Jessica Cook appointed as Chief Revenue Officer at Surgimate in the U.S., tasked with overseeing sales and marketing efforts.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 14.7%, with approximately 20.5 million people currently out of work. This surge in unemployment is a result of the ongoing economic challenges due to the pandemic, which has also led to a significant decrease in GDP by 4.8% in the first quarter of the year. The government has been implementing various measures to support businesses and individuals during this difficult time, including stimulus packages and unemployment benefits. Experts predict that it may take several years for the economy to fully recover from the impact of the pandemic.
news.headline: Major Russian steel company faces shutdown risk due to economic slowdown.
